title: Sweet Jalebi Pita Bites
description: A fusion dessert featuring crispy pita bites filled with sweet jalebi syrup and topped with sweet Indian spices.
instructions: 2. Cut the pita bread into bite-sized pieces and place on a baking sheet.
3. Drizzle the coconut oil over the pita pieces and sprinkle with powdered sugar, cardamom powder, and cinnamon.
4. Toss the pita pieces to coat evenly.
5. Bake in the oven for 10-12 minutes, or until crispy.
6. Remove the pita pieces from the oven and let cool slightly.
7. Dip each pita piece into the jalebi syrup, coating completely.
8. Roll the dipped pita pieces in sesame seeds to coat.
9. Place the coated pita pieces on a wire rack to cool completely.
10. Serve the sweet jalebi pita bites dusted with confectioners' sugar.
